sentences.english: Are you a morning person or a night person?
Explain why and how it affects your daily life.
sentences.korean: 이유와 일상에 어떤 영향을 미치는지 설명하세요.

sentences.english: I do my best thinking and most creative work late at night when the world is quiet.
sentences.korean: 세상이 조용한 밤늦게 최고의 사고와 가장 창의적인 작업을 해요.

sentences.english: There are no phone calls no emails and no interruptions.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Working in a Team vs. Alone
A Piece of Advice That Changed Your Life

sentences.english: However this does cause some problems because most of the world operates on a morning schedule.
sentences.korean: 하지만 세상 대부분이 아침 일정으로 돌아가기 때문에 문제가 되기도 해요.

sentences.english: I sometimes struggle to wake up for early morning meetings.
sentences.korean: 이른 아침 회의에 일어나는 게 가끔 힘들어요.

sentences.english: But overall I wouldn't trade my quiet productive nights for anything.
sentences.korean: 하지만 전반적으로 조용하고 생산적인 밤을 그 무엇과도 바꾸지 않겠어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Attending a Large vs. Small School
